commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: generate config/prometheus.yml and nginx/nginx.conf as actual files

The generator referenced these files in docker-compose.yml volume mounts
but never wrote them to disk. Docker would create a directory at the missing
path and then fail to mount it as a file, causing:

  "not a directory: Are you trying to mount a directory onto a file?"

Fix: added generatePrometheusConfig() and generateNginxConfig() functions
and wired them into the task list:
- config/prometheus.yml is generated whenever Prometheus is enabled
- nginx/nginx.conf is generated for multi-node topology

Both are generated inline (no template engine) to avoid template function
dependency issues.

Add paper figure reproductions, README, and CLAUDE.md

- Add 5 new figures reproducing key figures from both papers:
  fig27: Steinberg Fig 3 (P1 Case 2 with m=3 wide, n=2 tall-narrow)
  fig28: Steinberg Fig 4 (tightness of 2*OPT bound, two sub-cases)
  fig29: Augustine Fig 1 (Omega(log n) lower bound, Lemma 4)
  fig30: Augustine Fig 2 (fixed height lower bound, Lemma 7)
  fig31: DC algorithm partition visualization (S_bot/S_mid/S_top)
- Add README.md with project overview, quick start, and figure index
- Add CLAUDE.md with project instructions and critical implementation details
- Total: 31 figures, 171 tests passing

commit.message:
fix: Mobile icon text leak — global CSS was overriding mobile display:none

The global `display: inline-block !important` rule for Material Symbols
appeared after the mobile media query rule, winning due to CSS cascade
order. Fix: wrap global icon styles in `@media (min-width: 769px)` so
they don't conflict with mobile `display: none`. Also add explicit
button sizing and system-font ::before pseudo-elements for sidebar
toggle buttons on mobile.

commit.message:
[feat] Finalize status msg into completed group instead of delete+resend

Status message flow:
1. Status msg shows live progress (edit in place)
2. When group completes, status msg is edited into the finished group
   (💬 thought + expandable tools) — stays in place, no deletion
3. New status msg sent below for next work
4. On completion, final status deleted, clean answer below

No more delete+resend flicker. Each completed group is just the
previous status message edited into its final form.

commit.message:
Add 26 example figures covering simple cases, edge cases, and stress tests

Figures organized in 5 categories:
- A (fig01-05): Simple cases — single rect, side-by-side, paper example,
  P1 trigger, P_{-1} trigger
- B (fig06-10): Core algorithms — Steinberg 15 rects, chain/diamond/tree/fan DAGs
- C (fig11-18): Edge cases — all width=1, tiny rects, one large + many tiny,
  width=0.5 boundary, mixed sizes, identical, deep chain 50, chain-of-groups
- D (fig19-20): Analysis — approximation ratio plot, DAG structure comparison
- E (fig21-26): Multi-panel galleries, Steinberg vs naive, bound scatter plot

  how many volunteers have each item vs how many need to borrow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix boiler not turning off at peak in summer mode (v1.0.36)

The peak tariff turn-off had a `hour > deadline` guard that prevented
the boiler from turning off between 07:00-08:00 in summer (deadline=8).
Peak starts at 07:00 on weekdays — boiler should turn off immediately
when peak starts, regardless of the heating deadline.

Removed the deadline guard from the peak tariff block. The deadline
is only relevant for scheduling when to heat, not for blocking peak
turn-off.

Replace fonts with Neue Montreal, redesign service times, add pill glass nav

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add v2 intent-matching pipeline, robust error handling, and production README

- Add v2 pipeline: 4-verdict taxonomy (EXCESS_PATCH, EXCESS_TEST,
  VAGUE_SPEC, CLEAN) with per-hunk and per-assertion granularity
- Add intent extraction from problem statements with acceptance criteria
- Add structural diff analysis (AST-level function/class change detection)
- Add per-assertion ON_TOPIC/OFF_TOPIC classification for F2P tests
- Fix LLM error handling: fail loud instead of silent fallbacks
  - Disable OpenAI SDK built-in retries (prevent dual-layer retry storms)
  - Add exponential backoff with 60s cap (7 attempts, 5s base delay)
  - Raise RuntimeError on exhausted retries instead of returning empty
  - Surface pipeline errors as SEVERE reports (not hidden as CLEAN)
- Add unit tests for v1 and v2 scoring logic
- Rewrite README with full architecture docs and error handling section

commit.message:
fix(ci): prevent deploy cascade-cancel and add upload retry (#621)

* fix(ci): prevent deploy cascade-cancel and add upload retry

Production deploys were getting cascade-canceled when multiple PRs merged
in quick succession (cancel-in-progress killed each deploy before it finished).
The final non-web push then skipped the deploy entirely via paths-filter.

Changes:
- Only cancel-in-progress for PR previews, not production deploys
- Add 3-attempt retry loop on vercel deploy upload step
- Use --archive=tgz to bundle uploads (prevents Vercel rate limiting)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore(ci): add warning comments to prevent bots removing --archive=tgz

Sentinel PR #616 previously stripped --archive=tgz when fixing quoting,
causing the exact rate-limit issue it was meant to prevent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(ci): extract deploy retry loop into reusable script

Deduplicates the 12-line retry loop from both production and preview
deploy steps into .github/scripts/deploy-with-retry.sh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): add argument validation guard to deploy retry script

Prevents false success when script is invoked without arguments,
as "$@" would expand to an empty command that succeeds silently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): allow env var overrides for retry configuration

Use parameter expansion with defaults so workflows can customize
MAX_ATTEMPTS and BACKOFF_SECONDS without editing the script.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Spell out engineering degrees in full

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement strip packing with precedence constraints

Steinberg's Algorithm M (SIAM J. Comput. 1997) for strip packing with
absolute performance bound 2*OPT, and Augustine et al.'s DC algorithm
(SPAA '06) for precedence-constrained strip packing with (log n + 2)*OPT
approximation guarantee.

Includes 7 reduction procedures (P_{-3} through P_3), full test suite
(171 tests: unit, property-based with Hypothesis, stress, integration,
cross-validation), visualization utilities, and example figures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: Strip packing with precedence constraints: Steinberg's Algorithm M (2*OPT) + Augustine's DC algorithm ((log n + 2)*OPT)

commit.message:
[feat] Status message stays at bottom, shows only current work

Major UX change:
- Status message is deleted and re-sent each refresh (always at bottom)
- Only shows current action + elapsed time (no past steps)
- Past intermediate groups are separate messages above (already sent)
- Status deleted on completion — clean final answer at bottom

Flow in chat:
  💬 Let me check... (sent, stays)
  ▼ ✓ bash: ls

  💬 Found it... (sent, stays)
  ▼ ✓ edit: file.py

  ⠋ Working... ⏱ 25s  ← live status, always at bottom

  Final clean answer here.

Fix: initialize EN locale rows before writing translations

Globals seeded before localization was enabled lack _locales rows
in PostgreSQL. Re-save with locale='en' first to create them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: always merge metadata.yaml so server_version is never shadowed

When a support package contains both support_packet.json and metadata.yaml,
the normalizer loaded support_packet.json as Diagnostics and then skipped
metadata.yaml entirely (guarded by 'if len(np.Diagnostics) == 0').
This caused server_version: 10.11.4 in metadata.yaml to be ignored, and
the tool instead picked up a legacy "version" field (e.g. "2.4.0" — a
config schema version) from support_packet.json or config.json.

Fix:
- metadata.yaml is now always read and merged into Diagnostics regardless
  of whether a JSON diagnostics file was already loaded. Its keys overwrite
  conflicting values, so server_version always wins.
- Removed {"version"} and {"Version"} from extractVersionFromDiagnostics —
  these fields hold format/schema versions, not the MM server version.
- server_version is now the first path checked in extractVersionFromDiagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
